name: @echatbot/database
description: Shared Prisma database client for eChatbot

scripts.migrate:dev: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS" != "true" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:dev in production! Use ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS=true to override' && exit 1; fi && prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:reset: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS" != "true" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:reset in production! Use ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS=true to override' && exit 1; fi && tsx scripts/safe-reset.ts
scripts.migrate:reset:force: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS" != "true" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:reset:force in production! Use ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS=true to override' && exit 1; fi && prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.seed: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS" != "true" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run seed in production! Use ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_OPERATIONS=true to override' && exit 1; fi && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:push: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run db:push in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma db push
